free_text: Low-energy elastic-scattering of alpha particles from
Four 500 mu-m Si surface barrier detectors (one
for monitor at 90 deg with respect to the beam and the
three others for angular distribution measurements).
Angular acceptance of them is 0.5 to 1 msr.
On. from Zoltan Mate through Peter Mohr
